response.justification: Significant domain mismatch. While the candidate demonstrates exceptional seniority and systems engineering capabilities across 14+ years, they lack the specialized hardware expertise essential for this role. The resume shows no background in SoC/IP modeling, hardware description languages, GPU architecture, or AI accelerator optimization—all core requirements. Experience is exclusively in software engineering (web, full-stack, backend, DevOps), not hardware design. The senior-level foundation is positive but cannot substitute for required hardware and accelerator domain knowledge.
strengths: 14+ years of senior engineering leadership with proven impact on complex systems and microservices architecture
Experience with performance optimization and low-level languages (C, C++, DLang) for systems-level work
Demonstrated ability to mentor, teach complex technical concepts, and work cross-functionally across diverse technology domains
concerns: No experience with SoC/IP modeling, hardware description languages (Verilog, VHDL), or hardware design tools—a core required skill
Complete absence of GPU architecture, AI accelerator, or deep-learning workload optimization knowledge
Career trajectory exclusively in software engineering with zero hardware design or chip-level optimization background

key_factors.factor: AI Accelerator and GPU Optimization Experience
